WhyItMatters: Endpoint and XDR evidence can connect identity activity to device behavior, malware, or token theft indicators.
ReviewSteps: Review Defender XDR incidents and alerts around the same timeframe.
Pivot on user, device, IP address, file, URL, and process evidence.
Review Defender for Endpoint device timeline and logged-on users.
Look for suspicious browser, credential, token, scripting, or malware activity.
If confirmed malicious, follow approved containment workflow.
